description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on every push to master and tags, and on pull requests to any branch. The workflow consists of two jobs: test and lint. The test job uses a matrix strategy to run tests in multiple tox environments with different Python versions, installs dependencies, runs tox, and uploads results to Codecov. The lint job also uses a matrix strategy to run linters in different tox environments, installs dependencies, and runs tox.
